evals.prompt: Scope a 50MW hyperscale greenfield data center project in Loudoun County, Virginia. The project is at concept stage, led by a developer/builder. Facility type is hyperscale. Target IT load is 50MW with liquid-cooled GPU racks for AI training workloads. Phase 1 of a planned 3-phase campus.
evals.expected_output: A project plan selecting the Hyperscale Greenfield archetype from SKILL-CHAIN-MAP.md. Skill sequence starts with predev-site-feasibility, then eng-power-model, then eng-gpu-cluster and eng-cooling-design in parallel, then proc-rfp-generator and fin-project-tco. comp-sovereignty optional (domestic commercial). Risk flags include Virginia sales tax exemption eligibility, Loudoun County power availability constraints, and high construction cost market. Reference data includes all 6 files. JSON sidecar with skill_sequence array and risk_flags.
assertions: Archetype selected is Hyperscale Greenfield
Skill sequence includes all 7 available skills in correct dependency order
eng-gpu-cluster and eng-cooling-design are marked as parallel (both require only power-capacity-model)
Virginia sales tax exemption is flagged as applicable (referencing US-STATE-INCENTIVES.md)
Reference data list includes GPU-REFERENCE.md, COST-BENCHMARKS.md, POWER-TARIFFS.md, US-STATE-INCENTIVES.md, FEDERAL-TAX-GUIDE.md
Output includes both markdown report structure and JSON sidecar
Phase 2 follow-up questions include campus phasing and utility provider
Later-wave skill gaps are flagged (predev-market-study, predev-grid-interconnection not yet available)

evals.prompt: Scope a 30MW sovereign AI facility in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. Government-affiliated entity as owner-operator. Facility type is sovereign. Development stage is feasibility. AI training workloads for national defense and commercial cloud. Data localization required for government data.
evals.expected_output: A project plan selecting the Sovereign AI Facility archetype. comp-sovereignty is listed FIRST (before site-feasibility for sovereign projects). Risk flags reference REGULATORY-MATRIX.md for Saudi PDPL data localization, ownership restrictions, and CITC licensing. Power tariff flags from POWER-TARIFFS.md. No US-specific reference files. JSON sidecar with sovereign-specific risk_flags. Phase 2 follow-ups include security clearance, data residency specifics, and government vs commercial tenant split.
assertions: Archetype selected is Sovereign AI Facility
comp-sovereignty is listed first or parallel-first in the skill sequence
REGULATORY-MATRIX.md is referenced for Saudi Arabia regulatory requirements
POWER-TARIFFS.md is referenced for Middle East power costs
US-STATE-INCENTIVES.md and FEDERAL-TAX-GUIDE.md are NOT listed (non-US project)
Risk flags include data localization requirement and ownership structure considerations
Sovereign CapEx premium (30-50%) is noted in risk flags or project summary
Phase 2 follow-ups address security clearance level and data residency requirements

evals.prompt: Scope a 10MW brownfield data center conversion in Chicago, Illinois. Converting a former manufacturing warehouse. Investor (PE infrastructure fund) as counterparty. Design stage -- structural assessment complete. Enterprise colocation facility type. No AI/HPC workloads planned.
evals.expected_output: A project plan selecting the Brownfield Conversion archetype. eng-brownfield-convert is flagged as NOT AVAILABLE (Wave 4) with manual analysis recommended for structural capacity, contamination, and floor loading. eng-gpu-cluster marked as optional/not needed. Illinois incentive programs flagged from US-STATE-INCENTIVES.md. JSON sidecar includes gap_flags or equivalent notation for unavailable skills.
assertions: Archetype selected is Brownfield Conversion
eng-brownfield-convert is flagged as unavailable (Wave 4) with manual analysis recommendation
eng-gpu-cluster is marked as optional or excluded (no AI/HPC workloads)
Illinois state incentive programs are referenced from US-STATE-INCENTIVES.md
FEDERAL-TAX-GUIDE.md is referenced for Opportunity Zone and depreciation applicability
Phase 2 follow-ups include existing building details and known constraints
Brownfield cost/time tradeoff is noted (60-80% of greenfield cost, 40% less time)
Output includes both markdown report and JSON sidecar
